overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing first-person driving perspective on a multi-lane highway approaching downtown Los Santos. The scene features moderate traffic flow, clear sunny weather, and transitions from concrete retaining walls to grassy embankments while approaching overhead highway directional signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated urban highway with concrete retaining wall

events.description: black sedan overtakes on the left side at high speed
yellow lane merge warning sign appears on the right shoulder

agents.ego_description: driving steadily in the right lane of a multi-lane highway, maintaining speed with moderate traffic flow

notable_agents.action: black SUV traveling parallel in the left lane, maintaining highway speed
large box truck ahead in the same lane, moving at steady speed

entered.detail: tall concrete barrier separating the highway from the embankment, showing weathered texture
large metal lattice tower for electrical power lines
cluster of modern glass skyscrapers visible in the hazy distance
row of tall palm trees lining the left side of the highway
tall street light poles along the highway median

segments.scene_description: The segment shows highway driving with a concrete retaining wall on the right and palm trees on the left. The camera maintains a steady speed while following traffic, with the downtown Los Santos skyline visible ahead. A yellow merge warning sign appears on the right shoulder toward the end of the segment.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway transition with guardrail and grassy embankment

events.description: concrete retaining wall ends and transitions to metal guardrail with grassy slope
passing a red semi-truck with trailer on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing at highway speed, weaving slightly between lanes to navigate through moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: red semi-truck with cargo trailer traveling in the right lane
black sports car overtaking quickly on the left side

entered.detail: silver metal guardrail replacing the concrete barrier along the roadside
grass-covered earth slope rising beside the highway with scattered bushes
large green overhead directional signs becoming visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The roadside environment transitions from concrete wall to metal guardrail with a grassy embankment. The camera passes the yellow merge sign and continues toward the overhead green highway signs that are now visible ahead. Traffic includes various cars and trucks moving at highway speeds.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approach to overhead sign gantry

events.description: slight right curve in the road alignment as approaching the sign structure
passing directly underneath the large green overhead highway sign gantry

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady highway speed while approaching and passing under the overhead sign structure, traffic spacing out

notable_agents.action: white RV camper traveling in the left lane ahead of ego
motorcycle visible in the distance traveling in the same direction

entered.detail: large concrete and steel structure supporting the overhead directional signs
thick cluster of green trees and bushes on the right embankment

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the large green overhead highway signs indicating directions to Los Santos Fwy and other routes. The road curves slightly right as it passes under the concrete gantry structure. The right side features dense vegetation, and traffic has thinned compared to earlier segments.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person driving perspective on a highway that transitions from an urban corridor into a more open approach toward the downtown Los Santos skyline. It begins with the camera maintaining a steady speed alongside a concrete retaining wall and palm trees, moving through moderate traffic as a yellow merge warning sign appears on the right shoulder. As the vehicle passes the sign, the roadside environment shifts from the concrete wall to a metal guardrail and a grassy embankment. The scene then opens up as the camera approaches large green overhead highway signs, passing under a concrete gantry structure while the road curves slightly to the right. Finally, the traffic thins and the surroundings become more vegetated as the vehicle continues its trajectory toward the city center.
